hero.title: Who we are and what we do?
hero.subtitle: BLASTSERV - we are a young and dynamic team with a passion who have been involved in the blasting and painting industry for years. Our range includes machines for manual and automatic blasting process, wet and powder painting, drying booths and ovens. We are happy to answer any questions and provide expert advice.

items.title: Participation in industrial fair
items.description: We recently participated in the International Industrial Fair, showcasing our latest surface treatment technologies.

details.fullDescription: Our presence at the International Industrial Fair was a great success. We connected with industry leaders and demonstrated our new automated shot blasting systems. The positive feedback we received confirms our commitment to innovation and quality in surface treatment solutions.

items.title: New line of shot-blasting machines
items.description: Blastserv introduces a new, energy-efficient line of shot-blasting machines designed for heavy industry.

details.fullDescription: We are proud to announce the launch of our new generation of shot-blasting machines. These machines feature advanced abrasive recovery systems and energy-efficient motors, reducing operating costs by up to 20% while maintaining the highest surface preparation standards.

items.title: Expansion of service offerings
items.description: We are expanding our maintenance and repair services to cover a wider range of surface treatment equipment.

details.fullDescription: To better serve our clients, we have expanded our service department. We now offer comprehensive maintenance, emergency repairs, and technical surveys for all types of shot-blasting and painting equipment, ensuring your machinery operates smoothly and efficiently.

items.title: Completion of a large installation
items.description: Successful commissioning of a complete surface treatment line for a major automotive components manufacturer.

details.fullDescription: Blastserv has successfully completed the installation and commissioning of a fully automated surface treatment line for one of the leading automotive components manufacturers. The project included a tunnel-type shot blasting machine and a modern powder coating booth, significantly increasing the client's production capacity.

contact.title: Talk to our team
contact.subtitle: Learn how Wellth can impact health, cost, and quality outcomes for your organization.

items.title: Shot Blasting Machine
items.description: High-performance shot blasting machine for efficient surface preparation and cleaning.

details.fullDescription: Our Shot Blasting Machines are engineered for maximum efficiency and durability. They are ideal for removing rust, scale, and other contaminants from metal surfaces, providing a perfect profile for subsequent coating or painting. Featuring advanced abrasive recycling systems and robust construction, these machines ensure cost-effective operation and long service life.

items.title: Pipes Shot Blasting
items.description: Specialized shot blasting system designed for cleaning and preparing pipe surfaces.

details.fullDescription: Specifically designed for the internal and external cleaning of pipes, our Pipe Shot Blasting systems provide uniform surface preparation. They can handle various pipe diameters and lengths, ensuring that every inch is treated to perfection. These systems are essential for industries like oil & gas, water distribution, and construction.

items.title: Roller Conveyor Shot Blasting
items.description: Automated shot blasting system with roller conveyor for continuous surface treatment.

details.fullDescription: The Roller Conveyor Shot Blasting system is the workhorse of industrial surface preparation. It allows for the continuous treatment of plates, beams, and large structural components. The automated process ensures consistent quality and high throughput, making it ideal for large-scale manufacturing and fabrication plants.

items.title: Powder Coating Booth
items.description: State-of-the-art powder coating booth for high-quality surface finishing.

details.fullDescription: Our Powder Coating Booths offer a clean and controlled environment for applying high-quality finishes. Designed for maximum powder recovery and easy color changes, they help reduce waste and increase productivity. The advanced filtration systems ensure a safe working environment and meet all environmental regulations.

items.title: Spray Booth
items.description: Professional spray booth system for precise and controlled coating applications.

details.fullDescription: Achieve professional-grade finishes with our advanced Spray Booths. Whether you are using wet paints or specialized coatings, our booths provide the perfect conditions for a flawless application. Features include precision temperature control, efficient exhaust systems, and high-intensity lighting for detailed work.

items.title: Tunnel Type Shot Blasting
items.description: Large-scale tunnel shot blasting system for industrial surface preparation.

details.fullDescription: The Tunnel Type Shot Blasting machine is designed for high-volume, continuous processing of complex workpieces. Its tunnel configuration allows for seamless integration into production lines. This machine is particularly effective for heavy castings, forgings, and large steel constructions, providing thorough cleaning from all angles.

items.title: Repair
items.description: We solve any issues and remove breakdowns. The knowledge and experience we have allow us to get the job done quickly.

items.title: Maintenance
items.description: We perform technical surveys. This allows for trouble-free and efficient operation of the machine.

items.title: Spare parts
items.description: We provide all spare parts for shotblasting machines from leading manufacturers.

items.label: Quality control for every production batch
Reduced abrasive material consumption thanks to advanced technology
Machines operating without failure during the first 2 years
